name: Pasta W/Tuna & Fresh Basil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the tuna and cooked ziti.
2. Add diced sweet red pepper and chopped fresh basil.
3. Drizzle with lemon juice to taste.
4. Stir well to mix all ingredients evenly.
5. Cover and chill in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour before serving.
Serves 4 as a main course.
